title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 447.634 - Grant of temporary possession
text:
447.634.  Grant of temporary possession. — If the court grants the petition, the court shall enter an order approving the rehabilitation plan and granting temporary possession of the property to the organization.  The organization may, subject to court approval, enter into leases or other agreements in relation to the property.
(L. 1993 S.B. 376 § 8)
